title: Peking Beef Stir Fry
description: A classic Chinese stir-fry dish featuring tender beef, rich hoisin sauce, and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of stir-fry oil in a large wok or skillet over high heat.
Add the sliced beef and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until browned and cooked to your liking.
Remove the beef from the wok and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of stir-fry oil, sliced almonds, and minced ginger to the wok.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the almonds are lightly toasted.
Add the bell peppers and baby corn to the wok.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Return the cooked beef to the wok and stir in the hoisin sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the Peking beef stir-fry hot, garnished with sliced scallions.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
